title: Bridge Essay: Trust me, you are there: the role of verbal manipulation on embodiment and body

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body as process not substance — neuroplasticity reveals the self-model as continuously updated prediction.

**Trust me, you are there: the role of verbal manipulation on embodiment and body localization.**. Psychological research.. PMID: 41964800. DOI: 10.1007/s00426-026-02271-z. Body ownership (the perception of the body as belonging to oneself) and body spatial perception arise from multisensory integration and can be altered by body illusions (e.g., Rubber Hand Illusion, RHI). In the RHI, synchronous visuo-tactile stimulation elicits ownership over afake hand and shifts the perceived real hand position (Proprioceptive Drift). This study investigated whether altering body spatial predictions through verbal manipulation affects ownership in avirtual RHI (vRHI). In the...
